title: Meta Caps Internal AI Token Spending After Costs Approach Billions in 2026
abstract: This tool meticulously tracks and analyzes internal AI token spending within Meta Caps, providing insights to optimize budget allocation and enhance cost efficiency in artificial intelligence operations.
abstract_zh: 这工具就是个AI预算小秘书，专门盯着Meta Caps内部的AI经费花销不放，每个月把钱用到点子上，还给AI操作省了不少油水，简直不要太高效！像我这种花钱大手大脚的朋友，真该赶紧雇一个助手监督一下钱包。
